sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the established template, self-audited before commit. Completes b2.1. Covers the work-contract lexicon (CDI/CDD, embaucher/licencier/démissionner, syndicat, grève, indemnité, préavis, heures supplémentaires), revendication phrases (exiger que / tenir à ce que + subjonctif) and stacked pronouns in the imperative (rends-le-moi, donnez-m'en, parlez-lui-en; negative reverts: ne lui en parlez pas). Spirals from b1.2/unit-06-pronouns-narration. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego B2 (Hachette), Dossier 5 'Professionnel' ('Touche pas à mon contrat !', p.71; pronoms et double pronominalisation, p.75). Source PDF scanned; pages read visually. Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
